name: Neogenator
description:
A legendary Anshin adaptive shield that restores a small portion of your maximum health each second while it has charge. If an enemy has hit you recently, that regeneration ramps up sharply, regardless of how hard the hit was.

It works best in prolonged fights with frequent chip damage and is less reliable against heavy burst damage, since the regeneration stops whenever the shield is empty.
notes:
When copied through Sharing is Caring, Deathtrap does not receive this shield's health regeneration.

Like other adaptive shields, it has no elemental resistance immediately after being equipped or after loading in. That resistance only appears after taking elemental damage, disappears when the shield breaks, and has to be rebuilt after the shield recharges. The red flavor text references Henry David Thoreau.

special.description: While charged, it regenerates health and gains resistance to the last element that hit you. That regeneration becomes much stronger after a recent enemy hit, but stops completely while the shield is empty.
special.title: For an impenetrable shield, stand inside yourself.

abilities: Increases elemental resistance against the last elemental damage type received.
